catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for OCEANCOLOUR_HR products, detailing specifications and usage instructions for various ocean colour datasets from the Copernicus Marine Service.

product_line.name: Ocean Colour Biogeochemistry High Resolution Level 4 Near Real Time Product
